name: bozz-agents
description: Agent-agnostic context-management, review, and file-scoped cross-agent review skills.

interface.longDescription: Maintain project context and review documentation, plans, skills, and code with reusable Agent Skills.
defaultPrompt: Reconcile project context after this session.
Review the project's skills for contract drift.
Coordinate an independent cross-agent review with verified finding folds.
